mapper.select: SELECT id, display_name AS displayName, authority, managed_category AS managedCategory, category_admin AS categoryAdmin, system_role AS systemRole, created_at AS createdAt FROM roles ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO roles (display_name, authority, managed_category, category_admin, system_role, created_at) VALUES (#{displayName}, #{authority}, #{managedCategory}, #{categoryAdmin}, #{systemRole}, #{createdAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM roles WHERE id = #{id} AND system_role = false
